case_title: ICE MACHINES INCORPORATED VS MOFFETT SUPPLY COMPANY

docket_entries.description: SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MOFFETT SUPPLY COMPANY
DEFENDANT'S OPPOSITION TO PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FILED AND GIVEN TO NORA;
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION OF JUL-01-1999, GRANTED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,462.78 FILED BY ICE MACHINES INCORPORATED AS TO DEFENDANT MOFFETT SUPPLY COMPANY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-04-1999 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ICE MACHINES INCORPORATED RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MOFFETT SUPPLY COMPANY $60.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $60.00, DEFENDANT TO RETURN FREEZER TO PLAINTIFF. PLAINTIF TO ASSUME DELIVERY COSTS. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
PLAINTIFF'S MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION FILED; (GIVEN TO NORA) 15 DAY WAITING PERIOD
MOTION FOR RECONSIDERATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF ICE MACHINES INCORPORATED HEARING SET FOR JUL-01-1999 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ICE MACHINES INCORPORATED IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT MOFFETT SUPPLY COMPANY PLAINTIFF SHOULD SUE MOHAN LAL. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
